sections.paragraph:
- Original: τραῦμα

- Transliteration: Trauma

- Phonetic: trow'-mah

- Definition:

1. a wound

- Origin: from the base of titrosko (to wound

- TDNT entry: akin to the base of 2352, 5147, 5149, etc.)

- Part(s) of speech: Neuter

- Strong's: From the base of τιτρώσκω titrō skō (to wound; akin to the base of G2352 G5147 G5149 etc.); a wound: - wound.
